items.title: Diesel Generator 14kW Kubota V1505 w Newage Alternator
items.ai_notes: [Diesel Generator 14kW] Industrial diesel generator, priced well for a quick sale.
items.description:
I have for sale a used diesel generator. The engine is a 4 cyl Kubota V1505 and it runs at 1800 RPM. The generator is a Newage BCI164D1. This is a 12 lead generator so it can be configured for 277/480Vac 3 Phase, 120/208Vac 3 Phase or 120/240 single phase voltage output. In 3 phase configuration this generator will output @ 14kW. It will be about 10kW for single phase as the generator head is derated for single phase use. This setup has a brand new radiator, air cleaner, muffler and fuel filter installed. It has an auto start controller on it. Just push start and it will run the glow plugs, crank & start the engine along with monitor for safety shutdown. I have load tested the unit for over an hour at loads between 12-14kW and can demonstrate that for any buyer. This weighs 600 lbs and is approx. 44 long x 26 wide and 33" to the top of the radiator.
Would be great for irrigation units, car haulers, mobile mechanic, farm trailer etc.
Asking $ 1200 Cash obo. I have a forklift I can load it with. call Zach @ nine one three 429-5980

items.title: Heavy Duty Steel Industrial Workbench / Teardown Table
items.ai_notes: [Industrial Steel Workbench] Heavy-duty vintage industrial workbench with integrated fluid drainage.
items.description:
​Selling a vintage, commercial-grade heavy steel industrial shop workbench. This is a fully welded, bulletproof unit built to handle punishing garage, farm, or fabrication work—way tougher than any modern bolt-together bench you’ll find in a big box store.
​Key Features:
58 x 30 inches. Shelving 43 x 26 inches.
3 foot high
​Fluid Teardown Lip: Features a built-in tapered drop-gate / pour spout on the right side. Perfect for tearing down engines, transmissions, or differentials and draining oils/solvents cleanly into a bucket below.
​Containment Walls: High steel backsplashes and side lips on three sides keep parts, loose hardware, and messy liquids safely on the table.
​Massive Storage: Includes two deep, heavy-gauge steel undershelves to hold heavy toolboxes, parts, or equipment.
​Built Like a Tank: Gusseted corner braces and heavy-duty steel construction. It has an awesome authentic patina but is structurally rock-solid with no soft spots.
​Perfect for a mechanic shop, farm garage, DIY fabricator, or even cleaned up for a rugged industrial-style potting bench.
​Price: $200 cash
​Location: Pleasanton, KS
​Pickup: Local pickup only. You will need a truck/trailer and a couple of sets of hands to load it, as this is solid, heavy steel.
​Message me to set up a time to come grab it!

items.title: 300 Gallon Fuel Storage Tank on Stand
items.ai_notes: [300 Gallon Fuel Storage Tank] Steel tank on stand, surface rust present.
items.description:
Selling a steel fuel storage tank on a heavy-duty stand.
​Specs: Roughly 300+ gallon capacity (approx. 5’ long x 40" diameter). Stand puts the tank about 6 feet off the ground.
​Includes: Fuel nozzle and hose included.
​Condition: Sold "as-is." I am not aware of any internal leaks, but I cannot guarantee it. It has surface rust from age.
​CRITICAL TERMS OF SALE:
​Buyer must be able to remove and haul away. The buyer is responsible for getting the tank down from the stand and loading/hauling it.
​I do not have the equipment to lift or move this, so please bring the proper tools, a trailer, and extra hands to safely remove and transport it from my property.
​Serious inquiries only.
​Location: Pleasanton, KS. Message me with any questions or to schedule a time to come take a look.

items.title: Heavy Duty 430 Gallon Steel Tank (42” x 6’) Great for BBQ Smoker / Projects
items.ai_notes: [430 Gallon Industrial Steel Tank] Large industrial steel tank, suitable for smoker project.
items.description:
Selling a vintage, heavy-duty industrial steel pressure vessel/air receiver tank. This is thick, high-quality steel built to last, not the thin stuff you find on modern consumer tanks.
​Dimensions: 42 inches diameter by 6 feet long
​Capacity: Roughly 430 gallons
​Condition: Structurally intact with some surface rust and minor dents as expected for its age, but solid all the way through. Features a heavy-duty side flange and a top plug. Original data plate is attached.
​Excellent Repurpose Ideas:
​Custom BBQ Smoker: A 42" diameter is the holy grail size for a massive offset or reverse-flow competition smoker. The thick steel will hold heat perfectly.
​Biochar Retort Kiln: Built tough enough to handle high-heat burns for large-scale charcoal production without warping.
​Heavy-Duty Pig Roaster: Great candidate for a pull-behind event roaster.
​Off-Grid Utility: Perfect for a massive water settling tank, large-scale pond filtration/bio-filter, or non-potable water storage.
​Terms:
​Price: $200 cash.
​Loading: This thing is incredibly heavy (easily 500+ lbs). You must bring your own truck/trailer and the necessary equipment/muscle to load it. Message me if you're interested or want to come take a look!

Key Details About Maison Jansen Banana/Palm Trees:
Design & Style: These are large, decorative metal sculptures from the 1970s, often attributed to the prestigious French design house Maison Jansen. They represent the luxury, tropical, and maximalist aesthetic popular in Hollywood Regency interior design.
Structure: They often feature a solid brass base, with ribbed sheet metal leaves that can sometimes be arranged or assembled in slots.
Variations: While the "banana tree" with fruit is a specific, rare item, it is often grouped with the more common Maison Jansen brass palm trees and banana leaf floor lamps/chandeliers.
Usage: They are used as sculptural focal points in high-end interiors, often placed in corners or next to furniture.

With extra spacing in the cabin, you and your passengers can enjoy a comfortable ride, while the versatile cargo space allows you to bring along all your essentials for any adventure.

items.description:
Hot Rocks HR-70-22 Double Stack, Natural Gas Conveyor.  Only used for 6 months.  Compare to new online at $34,000.
Owned by college restaurant in Colorado that closed after 6 months of operations.  Lightly used, see condition in photos.
Stone Conveyor Oven, compatible with natural gas, triple stack, 70" x 22" baking surface, 25"L entry and 21"L exit conveyor belt, touchscreen panels, front access crumb trays and stone replacement, fully removeable stainless steel wire mesh entry and exit conveyors, up to 600°F (315°C) baking surface temperature, 100,000 BTU/HR per cavity, includes legs and locking casters, and stainless steel exterior panels, 208-240v/60/1-ph, 10 amps per cavity.
Hot Rocks Ovens are revered by pizza operators across the US and Canada for there ease of use, deck cooking, and speed of cooking.  Once you try Hot Rocks you will never go back to any other oven.
Oven comes with a factory new warranty of one year parts and labor.
We deliver anywhere in the 48 US states.  Professional delivery and installation is available.
Call Bruce at 720-519-3334.

items.title: 2013 Black MINI Cooper Countryman S – 6 Speed
items.ai_notes: [2013 MINI Cooper Countryman S] High mileage for a MINI, but well-maintained by enthusiast owner.
items.description:
We’re selling our beloved 2013 Absolute Black Metallic MINI Cooper Countryman S -
6-Speed Manual – Dual Sunroof – Black Interior - 165,745 Miles – in Roeland Park, KS
Have you always wanted a MINI Cooper but couldn’t live without four doors? Us too! Have all the fun of a MINI Cooper S (turbo) with all the practicality of a four-door hatch. Sadly we have to let her go because we’re moving and have too many cars ☹
I’m kind of a car guy and this has been mostly my wife’s car so you can bet I have always made sure it was kept up, running well, cleaned regularly and of course it spent almost its entire life in a climate-controlled garage.
Location: Roeland Park, KS 66205 Just off I35 and down Roe BLVD, about 7 minutes SW from downtown KC
Mileage: 165,745 (and counting?)
VIN: WMWZC3C57DWP51247
History: We are the 2nd owners after having bought the car from a dealership here in Merriam, KS in 2015. The maintenance has always been kept up and there have been no accidents or damage to the car. I got the Carfax to show it was a clean title and all that but forgot to download it and the link died so let me know if you need it and I’ll get another one.
Exterior: It’s a nice metallic black with tinted windows and upgraded wheels so it looks pretty sharp. It is 13 years old so of course it has a couple dings and scuffs but you wouldn’t notice the from ten feet (see pics). This car is pretty loaded so it has the HID headlight package, roof rails, chrome trim and comes with a tow hitch. The wheels are the upgraded aluminum 18” rims with new tires from just last year.
Interior: The interior is in really good shape for 13 years old. Again, pretty nicely appointed. It is all black on black “leather” interior with MINI’s iconic center console speedometer. The stereo has a factory CD player, Blue Tooth for your phone with built in mic along with aux and USB ports. We have added a heads-up LCD screen that does Android Auto, Apple CarPlay and front facing accident recording (plus some other stuff we don’t use).
The back seats fold down all three seats separately for an unexpected amount of cargo space. It comes with a cargo cover for the trunk, full cargo nets and a full set of front and back MINI brand rubber floor mats along with brand new (never used?) OEM carpeted mats. It’s got the dual sunroofs that both do that slant open thing but then the front one will go all the way back with a little wind screen that pops up. Both have shade screens to cover them if it gets too sunny. Oh, and the interior door lights can change colors or phase through the colors (our son loves that!).
The front seats will fold back to an acceptable napping position, it has a center console compartment that can fold back up out of its way, and it comes with a mounted MINI brand sunglasses case. The AC is cold, the heat is hot and the stereo is loud. Everything works as it should.
Engine: It runs a front-wheel drive 1.6-liter, turbocharged inline-4 engine producing 181 horsepower and 177 lb-ft of torque, so it’s got some pep to it. The engine is paired with a 6-speed manual transmission and gets approx. 26 MPG City / 32 MPG Hwy. The clutch was replaced last year along with the coil packs and plugs. Oil and air filters get changed regularly when needed as well as oil changes. Even though not required the car has been run almost exclusively on premium gas and will come with a full tank.
Asking Price: $8000 firm for now, if it doesn’t sell in the next couple weeks then I might negotiate.
Free ice scraper and tire pressure gauge!!! ;)
Geoff - Owner.

items.title: Weekly World News — 73 Issues — 2002, 1998, 2005, 1991
items.ai_notes: [Weekly World News collection (73 issues)] Niche collectible tabloid collection.
items.description:
There are 52 issues from 2002, 18 issues from 1998—including two glossy cover issues—two issues from 2005 and one issue from 1991.
I bought the 2002 and 1998 issues (60 in total) off eBay in 2020. Each of these issues but one has an address label referencing the same individual.
I bought the three others off eBay in separate transactions. None of these has an address label.
2002 has many mentions of Osama bin Laden, the world's fattest cat, the new world's fattest cat, a White House intern with three breasts, a figure skater with three legs.
The 1998 issues tend to concern the new millennium and related prophecies.
The 1991 issue is "MAN WEDS HIS OWN MOM!"
One 2005 issue is "GARDEN OF EDEN FOUND!"
The other 2005 issue is "ELVIS IS ALIVE — AND RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT!"
The issues have no markings or rips/tears, have been well treated and have assuredly been kept in smoke-free homes.

items.title: REDUCED - "MINT" Nikon D810 (USA) SLR Camera
items.ai_notes: [Nikon D810 DSLR camera] Well-maintained camera with low shutter count for its age.
items.description:
Mint "USA" Nikon D810.  New these went for $2800 + tax.  This is the final reduction I will make on this camera.
Shutter count/actuations are a very low 17,057 as of 4/22/2026.  Nikon says they are good for at least 200,000+.  Most get about 300,000+.  It has taken me almost five years to get to this shutter count and I am a semi-pro who uses it for all my indoor studio shots.
This camera has 36.3 MP (you will probably never need to go over 8-10 MP for incredible photos), which can easily be enlarged more than you will ever probably need.
I only use this camera indoors in my home studio.  Non-smoking, dog-free environment and kept in a safe with humidity control.  I take great care of my equipment.
Check out the photos.  I take very detailed shots so you can see what you are buying.
The Dr. Pepper photo was taken with this camera using a 105mm macro lens (lit by studio strobes) in my home studio.  The bowl of soup photo was taken with this camera using a 50mm lens (lit by studio strobes) in my home studio and the "hamburger" photo was also taken with this camera using a 105mm macro lens (lit by studio strobes) in my home studio as well.
The camera looks virtually brand new.
Included:
Box
Manuals
Battery
Battery charger
Strap
View NX2 installer CD
Original warranty card (Proof of USA Model)
Missing a short USB cable (UC-E22 cable)... about $25 if you want one.  Not needed unless you want to hook directly to your computer.
Be careful of non-USA Nikon products (grey market items).  Nikon will not repair or work on them if you ever need work done on it.

items.title: New Mercedes Sprinter Off Grid Camper Van
items.ai_notes: [Mercedes Sprinter Camper Van Build Slot] This is a commercial listing for a professional van conversion service, not a private party sale.
items.description:
Raft Tiger Vans has been building camper vans in Western North Carolina since 2019. We still have build slots available for 2026.
Video Walkthrough:
https://rafttiger.com/virtual-van-tour
Instagram @rafttigervans
Our base build is the ultimate travel ready home on wheels! Designed with ease of use in mind, our flagship camper van offers smart, spacious design with a robust power system for and all the comforts you need to live fully off-grid. Whether you’re chasing the van life dream or are the weekend warrior type, our vans have everything to keep you comfortable and connected to your adventure on the road.
We build exclusively on the Mercedes Sprinter short wheelbase hightop vans. The perfect size to be big enough to live in yet small enough to maneuver into those tight sought after camping destinations. Diesel, gas, RWD or AWD/4x4. Bring us a van or let us source a van for you to take care of every step of the process.

items.ai_notes: [1971 Suzuki TS50 motorcycle] Vintage bike with minor issues like a non-working headlight and dry-rotted tires. Requires a specific enthusiast buyer.
items.description:
I have for sale!
A 1971 Suzuki TS50 Goucho in excellent condition, Clean title in hand if you’d like to tag and use on the streets, comes with original key, leaks no fluids, repainted yellow. Has no turn signals but can be put on if wanting to tag and make street legal. Cleaned the gas tank, cleaned the carb, put new fuel filter on, put fresh 2 stroke amsoil in, put fresh amsoil gear oil, cleaned the exhaust baffle, tires hold air but do have dry rot. Small dent in front fender, headlight does not work do to the wire needing to be soldered, have manuals and NOS parts, starts right up when cold all the gears do works, brakes work. Clutch works.
Feel free to call, text or email me if you have any questions or concerns.

items.title: 🍦 RARE Vintage Dairy Queen "Cone & Lips" Single-Piece Sign Face
items.ai_notes: [Vintage Dairy Queen Sign Face] Rare vintage sign face, bottom section detached.
items.description:
Massive opportunity for a serious collector or reseller. This is a rare, single-piece 3D vacuum-formed pylon sign face from the iconic "Brazier" era of Dairy Queen. Unlike smaller versions, the 7ft cone and the 4.5ft tall lips logo are molded into one continuous, architectural panel. Finding a single-piece unit of this scale that hasn't shattered is extremely rare.
​Measurements:
​Overall Width: Approx. 7+ Feet.
​Lips Section: 4.5 Feet Tall x 7 Feet Wide.
​Soft Serve Cone: 7 Feet Tall.
​Depth: 8–12 inch 3D embossed profile.
​Collector Features:
​Crack-Free: Sign is fully intact withe the exception of the bottom portion detached, with no cracks, which is highly unusual for its age.
​Diagnostic Base Included: I am including the detached lower portion of the sign. It features the authentic 1950s/60s blue-and-white striped "Brazier" color scheme.  This identifies the set as a true mid-century survivor rather than a later discard.
​Project Potential: Perfect for a high-end shop display or man cave. Ready to be cleaned and backlit with a simple DIY LED setup.
​Terms:
​Price: $600 cash. FIRM
Priced fairly for a reseller to double their investment or a collector to get a "statement piece" below auction rates.
​Trades: Open to trades valued at $800
​Pickup: This is a massive, single-piece unit. You will need a flatbed trailer or a full-sized truck with a rack. Located in the Pleasanton area.

items.ai_product: Van Gaard Vanguard Studios Oil Painting
items.title: Vintage Mid Century Modern 1960s Oil Painting Van Gaard Vanguard Studi
items.ai_notes: [Van Gaard Vanguard Studios Oil Painting] Mid-century decor is collectible but the market is specific and slow.
items.description:
Vintage Mid Century Modern 1960s Oil Painting by Van Gaard Vanguard Studios 30x40
VAN GAARD Original Oil Painting Vintage 30x40 inches #319-W City view RARE!
Painting is in excellent condition. Superb 1960s mid-century original painting by the Van Gaard Studio of Beverly Hills, CA, owned by American artist Lee Reynolds Burr. Framed in an original dark stained hardwood frame, this painting is signed in the top right hand corner by Van Gaard.
The painting's dimensions are: Width: 30”, Height: 40”.
Including the frame, the dimensions are: Width: 36”, Height: 46”.
I believe the painting is Acrylic on Masonite but I am not sure. It has an abundance of texture (bumpy paint) on it.
Still has the paper backing on it which says 319-W, the paper backing has a few rips. The 3 inch wood frame has screw holes in it from where it was hung. Painting is in excellent condition!
About This Van Gaard Painting
Van Gaard is a name associated with mid-20th-century decorative art produced by Vanguard Studios (sometimes linked with artist Lee Reynolds). These works were created primarily in the 1950s–1960s as oil or acrylic paintings, often signed Van Gaard and sold as collectible or decorative art pieces.
Works attributed to Van Gaard typically feature:
- Mid-Century Modern style — bold compositions, abstract or figurative themes
- Oil or acrylic on board or canvas
- Signed by Van Gaard
- Often framed for display.

items.title: Purebred American Rabbits
items.ai_notes: [American Blue rabbit] Heritage breed rabbits have a specific market for breeders and homesteaders.
items.description:
Purebred Heritage Breed American Blue or White rabbits. This is a very rare Homesteader breed known for good mothering, large litters, good temperament, nice personality, and heat tolerance. Easy breeders and fast growers.
Kits weaning soon.  $50 for show quality and $25 for pet or meat quality. Great meat production. Wean weight 4-5 pounds at 8 weeks. Fryer weight 5-6 pounds at 10 weeks . Fast growth! American Blue or white rabbits are a very rare Heritage breed. Help preserve them. We had parents entered at ARBA national convention last year and place 4th or better in each category.  These make just as much meat as New Zealands but more fur and bigger litters.
Text 816 seven two six, 9626 for pickup. It's better to text than email as I don't check the email that often.

items.title: Chicks female only.
items.ai_notes: [Cream Legbar chick] Valued the Cream Legbar chick; seller has multiple breeds available at different price points.
items.description:
Different breeds of chicken hatched from incubator. About 2 weeks old as of today. All pullets, female. Currently have only 5 breeds left.
They are commonly sold for 15 dollars for newborns that are straight run meaning they are male and female. We have only female!!!
These are older so the scary age of newborns can be avoided, because they are strong, healthy chicks.
Cream legbar, very rare prized for their light sky blue eggs. They develop a tuft of feathers on their head as they get older. $20
Welbar, rare as well they lay some of the darkest brown eggs. Compared to a chocolate color. $20 Girls looks different than boys.
Bielefielder, dual purpose birds for meat and eggs. Lay large brown eggs. $15
Silver laced Cochin, beautiful birds that have feathery feet. Lay very large sized brown eggs. Have friendly personalities. $20
Golden laced Cochin, same description as silver laced $20.
I can do bundle offers. Message or call me for any questions. 417-three15-47six8

items.ai_notes: [Baluba Tribe Kifwebe Mask] High-end ethnographic art; requires a specialized buyer and is very slow to sell.
items.description:
20th Century Kifwebe Mask from Baluba Tribe in Bosonge Zaire Africa.  It is believed by the Baluba tribe that wearing this mask gives power to ward off disasters and threats.  The mask can be worn at ceremonies honoring a dead chief, at the installation of a new chief and for welcoming important visitors as well as dignitaries.  Kifwebe was also used in exorcism rituals.  This mask was purchased from the curator at the Cleveland Museum of Art in 2000.   Measurers 20" H x 9" W.  Non-smoking home. See photos, call or text

items.title: Rabbit Manure
items.ai_notes: [Bag of rabbit manure fertilizer] High-quality organic fertilizer is a popular commodity for local vegetable gardeners.
items.description:
Rabbit manure is a great cold manure that can go straight onto gardens. Low price! $12 for a contractor cleanup bag that weighs 40 pounds. Rabbit Manure Fertilizer – Garden Ready, No Composting Needed. Fresh rabbit manure available from healthy, well-fed rabbits. This is one of the best natural fertilizers you can use. Perfect for vegetable gardens, raised beds, fruit trees, and soil building. High in nitrogen and nutrients, but gentle enough that it won’t burn plants. Also great for improving soil structure and water retention.
This batch includes a mix of rabbit pellets, composted rabbit pellets, and worm castings, as many of our cages have earth contact so red wrigglers help to digest the manure before selling. This helps add organic matter and improves long-term soil health. Ideal for gardeners who want a natural, sustainable alternative to chemical fertilizers.
Bagged up and ready for pickup. Located in Kansas City, KS.
Text

and let me know how much you need and when you’d like to pick up. I have 16 bags left.

items.title: Show Quality Cayuga Ducklings – Larger, Hardy, Great Egg Layers (KC)
items.ai_notes: [Cayuga ducklings] Ducklings are seasonal and have a steady niche market for homesteaders.
items.description:
Show-quality Cayuga potential ducklings—larger, hardier, and bred for both eggs and meat. Strong, fast-growing birds that outperform typical hatchery stock. These ducklings come from award-winning lines with multiple champion titles at regional and national shows. At the same time, they are selected for real-world performance—excellent egg layers, good meat size, and hardy birds that do well in backyard and small farm environments. Great for homesteads, beginners, or anyone looking for productive, low-maintenance ducks that are already set up to thrive. Cayugas are known for their rich flavor, strong laying ability, and adaptability to different climates.
We also have purebred Blue Solid and Silver Solid Ducklings.
Hatch dates every two weeks with local pickup in Kansas City, KS. Hatchlings are $10 each straight run. The quality genetics are worth it! Hatching eggs are also available for $30 per dozen. Limited number available each hatch—text to reserve yours.

items.title: Engineered White Oak Hardwood Flooring - 7.25" Wide Plank - $1.99/sf -
items.ai_notes: [Engineered White Oak Hardwood Flooring] Valued the white oak flooring at $1.99/sq ft; this is a bulk liquidation sale.
items.description:
If you want the look of wide plank white oak without paying retail prices, this is it.
We have 21,928 square feet of Noble's Way engineered white oak in the Winter River finish priced at $1.99 per square foot. This is first quality, U.S.-made flooring -- not seconds, not overrun junk, not a discontinued line nobody wanted. It's a legitimate deal on a legitimate product.
The 7.25" wide plank gives you that open, modern look you see in high-end homes and design magazines. The Winter River color runs light and cool -- a whitewashed, natural oak tone that works with gray walls, blue walls, warm neutrals, and everything in between. The wirebrushed surface texture adds depth and hides everyday wear. The micro bevel edge gives each board a clean, defined look that reads as intentional, not cheap.
The specs matter on engineered, and these are solid: 3/8" thick construction, low gloss finish, and a 25-year residential warranty. Wide planks at this thickness are designed to be glued down or floated, making this a practical choice for slabs and above-grade installations alike.
At $1.99 a square foot for first quality white oak this wide, you are not going to find this price at a flooring showroom. Retail on comparable 7" and wider engineered white oak runs $6 to $10 per square foot regularly.
Call us to check availability or get a shipping quote: 800-253-2728
More photos and details at ReallyCheapFloors.com
